creator: olivier@cochard.me
text:
Hi,

Why the severity of this bug is "non-critical" ?

This is a critical problem that prevent to use "embedded" FreeBSD
(like NanoBSD) to boot from USB devices.

Will this bug be fix for the 8.1-release ?

Can I help you to resolve this bug by providing some debug output ?

Meanwhile, thanks a lot's for your working patch Crazy Alex !

Regards,

Olivier
